topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: On page load I see: Error loading categories for keyword mappings: Error: Unexpected token < in JSON at position 0 at loadCategoriesForKeywordMappings (index:3073). Expected: category dropdown for keyword mappings loads without console error.

FireflyService.getCategories() (GET /api/v1/categories to Firefly), App.js #getCategories (/api/categories proxy), public/index.html loadCategoriesForKeywordMappings (line ~3054) and loadAccountsAndCategoriesForAccountMappings (line ~3163).

Must not break other Firefly API calls; FIREFLY_URL/PAT env contract unchanged; brownfield Docker deployment (firefly_app hostname). R-0001 notes Firefly expects Accept: application/json — currently missing on getCategories().

Manual: load admin UI — no Unexpected token error in console; category dropdown populated when Firefly reachable. curl GET /api/categories returns success:true with categories array, or structured error (not raw JSON parse message) when Firefly unreachable.
BUG-0001 acceptance rows pass; keyword-mapping and account-mapping category selects load on page load without cryptic JSON parse errors.
